programme.title: Paranormal Activity 4

programme.desc: An investigation into the death of Karla Mendez Brada, a woman struggling with addiction, who sought help in an AA program in California; the ex-con she fell in love with; and the circumstances that caused police to suspect him in her murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pork loin is delicious roasted in the oven, but it takes on a new character when cooked on the grill. The fire imparts a delicate smokiness to the meat, and the heat creates a handsome crust. French potato salad is a perfect counterpoint to the pork.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We wanted to develop a recipe for pulled pork that rivals that of the best barbecue joints but won't be an all-day affair. We pair the pork with another barbecue classic—cornbread.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: If you're a fan of saucy barbecued chicken, you'll love pulled chicken. Similar to the more traditional pulled pork, it's simply tender shreds of smoky grilled chicken moistened with barbecue sauce.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Summer desserts are all about fruit. As inviting as a bowl of sweet berries can be, there's something about baked fruit desserts that we can't resist. In this episode we take a look at two summer favorites: blueberry cobbler and free-form fruit tart.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: With its impressive mounds of tender, juicy apples and melt-in-your-mouth pastry crust, deep-dish apple pie should take your breath away. Creating a pie with such a high volume of filling does, however, pose challenges.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: There seems to be a cookie to fit any occasion or mood. In this episode we look at two from opposite ends of the style spectrum—the thick, homey oatmeal and the dainty, elegant spritz.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we aim to resurrect the traditional birthday cake. We've developed an honest-to-goodness layer cake with an old-fashioned jam filling and real butter frosting—the type of cake guaranteed to put a smile on anyone's face.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: German chocolate cake—filled with sticky pecans and coconut—is not without flaws. We set out to develop a German chocolate cake that avoids the common pitfalls and delivers on its promise.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We set out to make a meatloaf with well-seasoned meat and just enough binder to give the loaf a tender, not tough, texture. In choosing a side dish to partner with our meatloaf, we turned to another old-fashioned dish—skillet-roasted potatoes.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Dinners prepared entirely in one skillet are perfect for weeknight cooking. Less cleanup is one obvious benefit. A skillet also gives the cook a bit more control over cooking multiple elements.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Beef, beer, and onions have a natural affinity—it's one reason burgers and onion rings are often on bar menus. In a carbonnade, the beef melds with the soft sweetness of sliced onions in a lightly thickened broth that is rich, deep, and satisfying.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We wanted a streamlined version of roast chicken with plenty of stuffing to go around. First, we needed to solve the problem of cooking the stuffing to a safe temperature without drying out the delicate breast meat of the chicken.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Boneless pork chops are lean and quick-cooking, making them ideal for weeknight meals. Pork tenderloin, which is also lean, has a somewhat fussy reputation, but you don't need to be a professional chef to cook tenderloin properly.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We make a fresh-tasting, quick tamale pie with a juicy, spicy mixture of meat and vegetables and a quick homemade-cornbread topping. We also show you how to cook up a really flavorful chicken stew topped with a biscuit crust.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Whether we admit it or not, there are some dishes that are a little too high in fat and calories to be enjoyed on a regular basis. Even a modest portion of macaroni and cheese or chicken Parmesan is prohibitive. But that doesn't need to be the case.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We wanted to be able to serve English-style fish and chips—large pieces of moist and delicate cod in a crisp and tender coating with thick-cut fries—at home.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Commonly found at catered events, this once-highbrow dish has become a bit of a joke. But after preparing several cookbook versions, we realized that pairing a crisp-fried coating with a delicate butter sauce was a great idea that deserved a revival.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: While the hallmark of this filet mignon is its tender texture, some argue that the beefy flavor is too mild, lacking the oomph of fattier cuts like rib eye. So we aim to boost the filet mignon's flavor with a peppercorn crust and a rich pan sauce.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We love a good stir-fry served with rice, but a noodle cake, a savory round of tender noodles sautéed in a skillet until the exterior is crisp, is also a great base for a saucy stir-fry.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We prepare a Thai-inspired beef stir-fry and share a recipe for great potstickers.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We create tasty versions of two Tex-Mex favorites: chicken fajitas and huevos rancheros.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Just when we think we've become familiar with every Italian dish under the sun, we're pleasantly surprised to come across one we've somehow overlooked—Spaghetti with Marinara Sauce.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Fifty years ago, steak Diane was prepared tableside and included a burst of pyrotechnics supplied by a match and some cognac. Sure, such theatrics might seem a bit dated and silly, but they are essential to the flavor of the dish. We explain why.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Most of us might not have time to prepare eggs during the week, but come the weekend, eggs are a terrific way to begin a leisurely day. In this episode, we take a look at a couple of our favorite egg dishes—scrambled eggs and omelets.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Delicate foods, such as shrimp, are trickier to cook over the grill's intense, dry heat. We wanted to find the best way to grill shrimp so that it ends up tender, moist, and flavorful.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Summertime entertaining can often mean preparing food for groups. If you're looking for a main course to serve a crowd or want to give a new twist to a summer vegetable, we offer recipes for tender beef brisket and savory corn fritters.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we show you how the strangest-sounding methods can sometimes be the most rewarding and how a few easy tricks can give an old standby, like roast chicken, a new lift.

programme.desc: Desperate to make progress on his house, Jeff decides to cram the entire kitchen into his office; Jeff and Gage find themselves in a power struggle before leaving town to meet up with Alexandra; Zoila moves out to make room for the nursery.

programme.desc: The countdown to the baby's due date leaves no time for slowing down; while demo at home in Valley Vista starts on the master suite, Jeff and his team continue to work with clients; Gage's stress becomes obvious.

programme.title: Flipping Out
programme.desc: As the baby's due date approaches, Jeff and his team rush to make final preparations; worried about missing the birth, Jeff and Gage head to northern California to wait for the call; after nine months of pregnancy, they finally meet their daughter.

programme.title: Flipping Out

programme.desc: HQ's experts dissect upcoming games and dish out top bets.

programme.desc: CBS Sports HQ keeps you completely up to speed with highlights, top stories and in-game updates.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El NCIS relaciona un mensaje en sangre dejado por un comandante de la Marina asesinado con un manuscrito que puede contener información militar clasificada.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Para disgusto de Gibbs, el agente especial EJ Barrett regresa para dirigir la investigación de la muerte de un marinero que puede estar relacionada con una serie de asesinatos relacionados con el puerto.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La puerta de los pobres
programme.desc: Danny y Maria investigan el asesinato de un residente de bajos ingresos en un edificio de lujo con unidades asequibles. Frank se enfrenta a un problema con un detective amigo de Gormley que abusa de su posición.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Jugadores energéticos
programme.desc: Cuando un testigo clave se retira, Erin debe traer a un informante protegido de la mafia a Nueva York y mantenerlo a salvo con ayuda de Danny y Maria. Frank mantiene tensas negociaciones con el alcalde Poole.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Sin salida
programme.desc: Un hombre emocionalmente perturbado retiene a Maria como rehén a punta de pistola en una sala de interrogatorios. Danny debe cumplir sus demandas para protegerla. Mientras, Frank enfrenta un dilema personal y moral.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Gajes del oficio
programme.desc: Erin se siente conmocionada por un asaltante que irrumpe en su apartamento. Jamie y Eddie descubren una bomba en el apartamento de una anciana. Frank investiga una organización benéfica sospechosa.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo investiga los cadáveres quemados de varios indigentes cerca del muelle de Santa Mónica en California.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo está buscando un autobús escolar desaparecido lleno de alumnos en Washington, D.C.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un seguidor de un conocido orador motivacional es asesinado, el equipo sospecha del propio orador.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Una serie de extraños rituales de asesinato conducen al equipo en busca del asesino.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo del NCIS se entera del espeluznante asesinato de uno de sus antiguos ayudantes de investigación, pronto descubren que la víctima ha estado vendiendo información sobre cómo robar un almacén lleno de posesiones caras.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs cuestiona los motivos de Vance cuando le piden que interrogue a un adolescente acusado de matar a su padre, un marine retirado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El NCIS relaciona un mensaje en sangre dejado por un comandante de la Marina asesinado con un manuscrito que puede contener información militar clasificada.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A distinctive tattoo reveals a wanted felon’s true identity. Deputies talk to a young woman who traded one bad habit for another. A man in possession of a stolen vehicle tells officers how his day went from bad to worse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man receives an enormous break due to public health concerns. Officers are doubtful when two friends claim they were unaware of each other’s actions. Police pull over a car full of people who know very little about themselves.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car chase involves tire spikes, shredded rubber, and crashed gates. Suspects accused of burglary state they only steal to pay rent. A traffic stop proves there’s always more than meets the eye.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect tries to outrun the law by bicycle but can’t out pedal police. A deputy goes undercover to investigate stolen baseballs. A K-9 discovers hidden contraband on a suspect’s most private places.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A seatbelt violation ends in a chase to the confusion of all involved. A suspect with a history of grand theft auto is found in another stolen car. Officers find drugs in a tough part of town.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers smell the pungent odor of marijuana during a minor traffic violation. Cocaine is found on a suspect pulled over for a broken windshield. A store is robbed by someone in a red dress.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man accused of burglary claims he’s hallucinating. A suspect tries to show off by parading his white pistol and causes pandemonium. A traffic stop offers an accused man a second chance.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: It’s all deputies and dogs on deck in an attempt to subdue a man in distress. A suspect proves to be too sleepy to engage in truck thievery. A baby is rescued in a car with no air conditioning.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers apprehend an individual with a saw-like knife. A man accused of auto theft claims his girlfriend allowed him to borrow her wheels. Chiquita the chihuahua helps its owner through hard times.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Stop sticks are deployed to intercept a vehicle with bullets. Two suspects watch their life unravel after being found with meth. Police assist young and restless runaways.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect can’t stop huffing butane. Mistrust proves toxic after a dispute over slot machines. A puppy proves to be the magic charm with individuals who’ve hit a rough patch.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen U-Haul is seized during a felony traffic stop. An unfaithful husband is caught hiding his mistress in the bathroom. Police assist an individual who is going through self-discovery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect forgets to drive away after breaking into a used car lot. A dispute over money ends in tire slashing. Suspects are found with narcotics and tall tales.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect fresh out of jail is found with narcotics. A motorcycle named 'Love Machine' is saved from a hot wire. A man bursts his tire in a bad place and officers come to the rescue.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies halt a burglary in progress. A truck is pulled over for stolen plates and officers question how it can start with a house key. A RV is no home for a family on the brink of falling apart.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Security guards face wild threats from a suspect who states he has a 'burner' gun. A man is bit on the head and nearly faints. A passenger throws out a suspicious bag during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man can’t handle that his van is getting repossessed. An Uncle finds his nephew has been hiding all kinds of secrets. Past lovers find their old wounds have yet to heal.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Meth and alcohol cloud the tragic accusations between husband and wife. A man learns why you should report if you recover your stolen vehicle. A woman says heroin is the only thing that can heal her.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies race against time to save a young boy who is trapped inside a house fire. An intoxicated patron demands a beer on credit and argues with a store clerk. An older woman struggles with heroin.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcycle with no license plate crashes while fleeing from Deputies. A woman driving a car with no windshield blames her ex-boyfriend. A gun is found hidden in a seat during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stabbing victim has his throat slashed while waiting for his wife. A man is shocked to learn that his rental box truck was reported stolen. Spice is found in a nervous passenger's purse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers spot two suspects on a city bus and a prolonged standoff occurs. A wanted man's friends lie to Deputies about his whereabouts. Deputies find meth in a one-armed man's truck.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen car and its occupants roll into a canal and are fished out by Deputies. A shoplifting trio is caught with stolen goods. A trip to the mechanic ends in an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car chase ends when a driver foot bails at a restaurant. A nervous female driver blows smoke at Deputies and refuses to exit her truck. A domestic violence suspect talks in circles when questioned.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A disgruntled man is tased, leaving his unhoused wife to fend for herself. A sovereign citizen is arrested for a stolen firearm. A man in possession of meth claims a bag belongs to his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man caught with a stolen moped attempts to run while handcuffed. Police find a man with his pants down behind a business. A suspect found asleep in his poorly parked car complains of sciatic pain.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen truck drives against traffic during a pursuit. A DV suspect overdoses after fighting Deputies. An intoxicated father assaults his openly-gay son and hides behind a tree.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a popular spiritual retreat when a body is found floating in a mud bath.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a ghost hunter.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: As Russell and his team investigate a series of murders, one of their own confronts peril on a dangerous undercover mission to get close to the killer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: D.B. Russell leads the CSI team on a hunt to find Morgan and Ellie Brass following their kidnapping by a ritualistic killer, in the 14th season premiere.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team is called in to investigate a murder and robbery at a poker game that had more than a million dollars in chips on the table.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a fire at a music venue that leaves four people dead, including two band members.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When contestants on a reality cooking show accidentally eat human flesh during a competition, the CSI team is brought in to investigate.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine Willows returns to help the CSIs solve a cold case that has haunted the team for 14 years, on the milestone 300th episode.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a homeless man who had a huge winning streak at a small casino.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a John Doe found during torrential rains in Vegas. Meanwhile, Greg Sanders is investigated and accused of framing a man for murder seven years ago.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a man is found dead inside a human-sized hamster ball, the CSI team is brought in to investigate. Also, the team collaborates with a swing shift CSI on a case involving a serial rapist.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team is called in to investigate the stabbing of a couple found at a local motel that is reminiscent of two incidents that occurred in the same room.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A spa weekend for Sara, Finlay and Morgan turns into a murder investigation and missing persons case when Finlay disappears, as the CSI team must piece together what happened in detail to find her.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a man is found murdered at an elaborate holiday party complete with real snow and live reindeer, the CSI team is brought in to investigate.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una enfermedad inexplicable que afecta a ciudadanos al azar de Las Vegas desconcierta a los CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un brutal asesinato por parte de una banda de motociclistas tiene lugar en un bar de motocicletas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un botín de fichas perdidas de un casino cerrado aparece en Las Vegas y le sigue una serie de asesinatos, lo que lleva a Langston a usar la fuerza letal por primera vez en su carrera como CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando Sara regresa inesperadamente, el equipo de CSI se une para investigar la muerte de una famosa joven actriz fallecida en un dudoso accidente de tránsito.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un productor de pornografía y un traficante de drogas son encontrados muertos en un área exclusiva de Las Vegas, el equipo de CSI centra su investigación en los miembros del vecindario.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando dos compañeros de oficina conspiran para robar un casino, su plan termina con los CSI investigando un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un policía mata a otro oficial, el CSI debe buscar las pruebas para determinar si el tiroteo fue premeditado o un accidente.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Todo un equipo de fútbol universitario es investigado cuando su querido entrenador es encontrado asesinado en su casa.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando dos crímenes aparentemente diferentes resultan estar vinculados, los CSIs descubren que están entrelazadas parte de la trama.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Tercera y última parte del crossover CSI, en el que el equipo de CSI de Langston ayuda a investigar una red de prostitución que puede haber albergado a un rehén que Langston ha estado buscando en Miami y Nueva York.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una prueba inusual revelada durante un torneo de bolos lleva al equipo de CSI a investigar un asesinato en un boliche.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando Nick, Greg y Hodges llevan a Henry a celebrar su cumpleaños a un bar de motociclistas, descubren un doble homicidio y encuentran a varios sospechosos todavía en el bar que pueden ser los asesinos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un gran tiroteo en una tienda de armas puede estar relacionado con la muerte de una mujer joven involucrada en un pacto suicida.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Dos hermosas mujeres son asesinadas en un hotel de Las Vegas y los CSI descubren a un asesino inusual durante su investigación.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A bizarre murder of a South Beach club owner turns out to be a script where art is imitating life. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio’s longtime criminal nemesis Walter Resden surfaces once again, and Caine is determined to finally bring him to justice.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Alex campaigns against a sex offender who moves into her neighborhood and then becomes embroiled in controversy when the man is murdered soon thereafter.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: What begins as a case of apparent Road Rage leads the CSI team to the investigation of a stolen $4 million necklace, which is tied to a murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a white supremacist is acquitted for the murder of his wife after learning she is racially mixed, it’s up to Horatio to bring the killer down.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A band of masked gunmen invade an upscale spa, with the female customers' luxury cars as their booty. A customer is injured in the melee.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The bodies of two men, shot execution-style, are discovered in an abandoned hotel slated for demolition. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A cell phone call leads the team to investigate a kidnapping that, unless they reach the victim before it’s too late, could soon become a murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A young, ultra-glam heiress and media darling is found electrocuted in her bathtub during a party, and there is no shortage of suspects.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of a cruise ship passenger, the team discovers that a murder has also taken place on the ship.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI Team is on high alert when the deadly Mala Noche gang initiates a shooting rampage during the trial of one of their members.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio’s search for Antonio Riaz continues. The Feds take over the lab and investigate each team member when $12,000 is missing from a drug bust.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: In pursuit of Marisol's killer, Horatio and Delko go to Brazil to avenge her death. In Rio, they are close to catching Riaz, Marisol's killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a male model is murdered, Horatio and the CSI team must enter the high stakes world of modeling in order to find the killer.

programme.title: Perturbados

programme.title: San Valentín sangriento

programme.title: San Valentín sangriento (2009)

programme.desc: Detective Virgil Tibbs investigates a series of elderly citizens that are being beaten and robbed. Things become more complicated as Detective Tibbs in-laws are visiting from Philadelphia trying to get him and his wife to move back home.

programme.title: All in the Family

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie stays up all night, expecting a phone call from a security guard who has information. It seems his company is laying off and he fears he may lose his job. No one else in the Bunker household can sleep either and it turns into a three ring circus.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Gloria has been reading books on women's lib and encourages Edith to try a little liberation. However, Mike won't take any of her ideas, which leads to huge fight in which Gloria demands that Mike recognize her as an equal partner in their marriage.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie is all set to go to the Mets game; however, Edith has different plans after she accepted an invitation to dinner with the Jeffersons. Archie discovers this and comes up with the excuse that Edith sprained her ankle, thus turns down the invitation.

programme.title: All in the Family

programme.title: All in the Family

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: When Verna May Rae passes on, Mama finally gets the opportunity to sing "Raytown, O Raytown" on Founder's Day. It's been 50 years since she first auditioned, and this time she will stop at nothing to win.

programme.title: Mama's Family

programme.desc: Vint is so embarrassed when Mama brings his childhood lunchbox to work that he accidentally cuts his finger and takes it to his bed, refusing to go back to work.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1995, Denise O'Neill, una mesera de Palm Beach, es secuestrada y asesinada. Su vecino, Luis Caballero, levanta sospechas por su comportamiento extraño hacia los equipos de TV que cubren el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, Derrick Duehren regresó para encontrar su casa en Oregon hecha cenizas. Los restos calcinados de su esposa se encontraron luego en los escombros. Los investigadores intentaron determinar si fue un accidente desafortunado o un asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el año 2000, el cuerpo de la bailarina exótica Rachel Siani fue encontrado debajo de un puente de Nueva Jersey. Los investigadores se preguntaron si se había suicidado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: A Prueba de Fuego
programme.desc: Un pirómano en serie inicia varios incendios que causan daños por un valor de millones de dólares y la muerte de tres personas. Él es descubierto, en parte, mediante el uso de hipnosis forense.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2004, Rebecca Barney y su futuro exmarido Fred fueron hallados muertos a tiros en su casa de Tulsa, Oklahoma, la cual había sido incendiada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, Pearl Smith, residente de Maine, desaparece después de una discusión con su esposo, Bill Bruns. Los investigadores encuentran un rastro de sangre que conduce al sótano de la pareja.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Dientes o Consecuencias
programme.desc: La investigación de un asesinato se ve obstaculizada por la falta de un cuerpo, pero la policía encuentra algunos restos carbonizados, incluyendo un diente cuyo relleno contiene propiedades que ayudan a los investigadores a identificar el cadáver.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos residentes de Seattle mueren después de tomar un analgésico de venta libre. El análisis de laboratorio de las pastillas muestra que estaban contaminadas con una concentración letal de cianuro. Originalmente lanzado como Temporada 2, Episodio 9.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asesino en serie andaba suelto y la policía tenía que encontrarlo antes de que atacara nuevamente. Su pista más prometedora era inusual: una huella dactilar sangrienta en el cuerpo de una de las víctimas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer desaparece, los amigos y familia se proponen encontrarla. Sus peores miedos se confirman semanas después cuando se descubre su cuerpo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Lleno de humo
programme.desc: Cuando una pareja de ancianos murió en un sospechoso incendio en casa, su hijo se convirtió en el principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Matan a un hombre joven en un misterioso accidente vehicular, pero la evidencia en la escena lleva a los investigadores a creer que no fue un accidente. La ciencia forense reveló lo que pasó realmente y la verdad es devastadora para tres familias.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Asesinato en el menú
programme.desc: Cuando el jefe de cocina de un restaurante histórico de Filadelfia fue encontrado muerto, los investigadores entrevistaron a los sospechosos habituales: familiares, amigos y compañeros de trabajo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1992, Laura Houghteling desapareció de su casa en Bethesda y nunca más se la volvió a ver. Los científicos forenses usan evidencia de su habitación para dirigir a la policía hacia un sospechoso principal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1995, la policía de San Diego está desconcertada por un par de manos encontradas en un contenedor de basura. A través de una investigación adicional, determinan que las manos son las de la persona desaparecida Don Hardin.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de inspeccionar el daño de una tormenta en un hogar en Tampa, un asesor de seguros simplemente desapareció. Treinta horas después, su cuerpo apareció en un río cercano. Pero el asesino había sido descuidado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando un rico magnate inmobiliario desapareció, pareció ser un juego sucio. En su testamento, dejó instrucciones sobre lo que sucedería si moría en circunstancias violentas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de dispararle a sus víctimas en la cabeza, el asesino limpió la escena, colocó la evidencia incriminatoria en una bolsa de plástico y la arrojó al río.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pedido fatal
programme.desc: Un hombre es encontrado muerto en su casa y su ex esposa tiene una coartada perfecta. Para determinar la hora de la muerte, los investigadores deben saber cuándo comió la víctima por última vez.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La mujer estaba muerta. Al hombre le habían disparado cuatro veces pero sobrevivió.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2000, Christina Sanoubane fue asesinada en su departamento de Cedar Rapids después de dejar a su abusivo novio. Hay pistas en la escena: huellas sangrientas y ADN del kit de violación de la víctima.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El mundo es un escenario
programme.desc: La policía es enviada a la escena de un tiroteo y descubren que el esposo de la víctima es uno de los suyos: un detective de homicidios que dice que su esposa se disparó accidentalmente en la cabeza.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de que una pelea callejera le quitó la vida a un campeón nacional de lucha libre, la policía tuvo que determinar si fue asesinado a sangre fría o en defensa propia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Durante 15 meses, un asesino en serie estranguló a prostitutas en Florida y luego se burló de la policía dejando los cuerpos a la vista. Las únicas pistas fueron una huella de neumático y algunos hilos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos hombres diferentes llamaron a la policía para denunciar el mismo asesinato. Al parecer, ninguno sabía que el otro había llamado. La investigación descubrió circunstancias aún más inusuales.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La policía sospecha del Dr. John Jack Boyle en la desaparición de su esposa, Noreen, cuando firma los papeles de la hipoteca de una nueva casa con una mujer que se hace pasar por su esposa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El caso musical
programme.desc: En 1999, una niña de 12 años fue encontrada asesinada en su casa y cambió la sensación de seguridad que tenían los residentes de la pequeña ciudad de Waseca, Minnesota.

programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Summer's over and the Degrassi kids are back…in droves. A neighbouring high school has been amalgamated with the Junior High and things are a bit of a zoo.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Summer's over and the Degrassi kids are back…in droves. A neighbouring high school has been amalgamated with the Junior High and things are a bit of a zoo.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Spike reveals the identity of the mystery man she's been dating, Emma is shocked. Mr. Simpson - her teacher! Emma claims she’s okay with it, but if that’s true, why is suddenly being so rude to Mr. Simpson?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley feels like an outcast. Nobody's willing to forget how she treated them at her party last year. Ash decides to take action, swallows her pride and apologizes to everyone. And it works. She boasts to Terri about her success- it’s like last year

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's Science Fair time at Degrassi. Emma’s a serious contender for first prize, but when the results of her experiment don't fall in line with her hypothesis, she's in a panic.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Joey is going away for the weekend with his latest girlfriend, and Craig is surprised when Joey tells him he can stay on his own – and even have the guys over! When the guys get to Craig’s for the weekend, they can’t think of much to do

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Degrassi Panthers have a new star soccer player, Spinner. His victory’s even sweeter when Paige agrees to a movie. When the losing team's defensive back, the gorgeous Dean, invites a smitten Paige to a house party, she cancels on Spinner.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Haunted by memories of her recent sexual assault, Paige is desperately trying to appear normal. A girl band contest sounds like a great distraction. Terri wants to reunite PMS—including Ashley. Paige refuses and recruits Hazel instead.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Toby is tired of being an invisible computer geek so he decides to join a sports team. Girls love wrestlers - that includes Toby’s crush Kendra. To Toby's dismay, the few extra pounds he carries put him in the same weight class as athletic Sean.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s crush on Craig has reached huge proportions and everyone’s urging her to ask him out already! But Manny’s a romantic; she thinks the guy ought to do the asking

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Grade Nine International Day is coming up and Hazel isn’t thrilled. After all, Hazel’s Jamaican and everybody loves the islands - right? When the day arrives, Hazel’s display is a hit, but she isn’t acting like herself.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma Nelson is reveling in her newest job as her mom's maid of honour and planner extraordinaire! Her mom, Spike, is marrying her high-school crush, Snake - who also just happens to be Emma's favourite teacher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma Nelson is reveling in her newest job as her mom's maid of honour and planner extraordinaire! Her mom, Spike, is marrying her high-school crush, Snake - who also just happens to be Emma's favourite teacher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco and Ellie are the best of friends. But Ellie is starting to want more…Marco though can’t seem to respond in kind. He’s more and more confused about what and who he’s looking for…

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When class clown JT acts up in Science class, his teacher Ms. Hatzilakos gives him a serious detention - assisting her with the guinea pigs all week. JT’s annoyed.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are looking up for Sean. He and Emma are back together. He’s a star on the basketball team. And he and Jimmy have buried the hatchet. Jimmy’s even invited him to a party. But the good feelings don’t last for long.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Liberty can’t believe it when she doesn’t make the Girls Floor Hockey team – she’s never failed at anything. So when Coach Hatzilakos asks her to be the Team Manager, Liberty throws all her energy into managing.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley and Jimmy are back together, but it doesn’t feel quite the same. Ash may not look the same as last year – she’s a Goth now – but Jimmy’s sure she’s still the same golden girl inside.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma’s mom is away for a few days and it’s just her and her step-dad, Mr. Simpson. He’s supportive of Emma’s involvement in “Food for Thought”; the student group who wants to remove genetically modified (GM) foods from the school cafeteria.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After being in counseling for a long time, Paige is positive she’s recovered from her date rape. In fact, she’s convinced her life is back to normal – Dean and what he did are behind her forever. She never wants to see him again, so she’s dismissive.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s exam time and everyone’s stressed – especially Craig. In a surprise visit from his father, Craig learns that his dad is very eager to have him back in his life.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Although his father is gone, Craig wants to get on with his life as normal. He insists on going back to school immediately and becomes frustrated with his friends when they behave with concern.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The pending birth a new baby for Spike and Snake inspires Emma to search for her birth father. With some detective work, Emma discovers that her father, Shane, lives just outside the city.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The pending birth a new baby for Spike and Snake inspires Emma to search for her birth father. With some detective work, Emma discovers that her father, Shane, lives just outside the city.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s on a mission this year—it’s bye bye cute and hello hot. That means midriff baring tops, low-riders and thongs.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige organizes a final hurrah at the beach and even convinces her older brother, Dylan, to act as chauffeur. Spinner’s a bit put-off by Dylan’s openly gay attitude, but his presence is an eye-opener for Marco.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner just can’t deal with the fact that Marco’s gay so he tries to cut Marco out of life. But when the guys all go to see Dylan’s hockey game, Jimmy makes sure that Marco comes along.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Richard Miles shows how 20th-century attention turned from civilisation and kings to the search for the common man against a background of science and competing political ideologies.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: A journey to discover the legendary lost city of Piramesse, a magnificent ancient capital built 3,000 years ago by the Egyptian pharaoh Ramesses the Great.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: In the Lambeyeque valley in northern Peru lies a strange lost world, the forgotten ruins of 250 mysterious pyramids, including some of the biggest on the planet, colossal structures made out of mud bricks.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: It was one of the greatest vanishing acts in history. More than 3,000 years ago a mysterious and ruthless civilisation rose from nothing, created a brutal and unstoppable army and built an empire that rivalled Egypt and Babylon.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: It is only in recent years that experts have unearthed the biggest dinosaurs that ever lived. One monster eclipsed all others, more than seven times as heavy as diplodocus was the immense argentinosaurus.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A new generation of carnivores was about to take killing to the next level. At the end of the Cretaceous period, these new hunter killers had spread throughout the globe.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A look at bizarre dinosaurs such as the curious buck-toothed Exipdexipteryx, the amazing four-winged Microraptor and the pot-bellied Nothronychus.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring the newfound remains of a dinosaur species considered the biggest carnivore in history, all while posing the question whether they engaged in a fight against the Argentinasaurus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The life of the first reptilian carnivores on Earth, told through computer animation.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic period saw the advent of the largest and strongest dinosaurs that ever roamed the Earth.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: A look at the world as it was 149 million years ago - in the late Jurassic Period. The old continents have broken up and much of the land is under water. Huge shallow seas have supported a revolution in marine life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: It is the late Cretaceous period and Tyrannosaurus rex is the top predator, but the Earth is poisoned by volcanic activity and a comet strikes.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: Professor Challenger leads a party of explorers from the smog of Edwardian London to South America in search of a mythical plateau rumoured to be inhabited by dinosaurs.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: Professor Challenger leads a party of explorers from the smog of Edwardian London to South America in search of a mythical plateau rumoured to be inhabited by dinosaurs.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor is sent to a skybase orbiting the planet of Solos in the 30th century, where he must deliver a sealed message pod; on the planet below, something is transforming the human population into hideous mutants.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Ky flees to the planet's poisonous surface, taking Jo with him; the Marshal, holding the Doctor captive, demands that he opens the message pod.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor gives the box to Ky, revealing the contents to be scrolls written in the language of the Old Ones.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Sondergaard make a discovery in the caves of Solos while Jo falls into the Marshal's trap.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Jo are once again sent into danger by the Time Lords when they are given a vital message capsule to deliver.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Marshal is on trial, with the Doctor as chief witness; Jo and the Doctor's friends are the Marshal's prisoners.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: An alien crashes in medieval England.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Sarah stows away aboard the TARDIS.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Irongron attacks Sir Edward's castle.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Linx prepares to take off.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor receives a mysterious package from his old companion, Jo Grant.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Lupton, now under the control of a giant spider, steals the blue Metebelis crystal.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Following Lupton, Sarah is accidentally transported to Metebelis 3 where she is captured.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor is in a coma and Sarah is held prisoner in the spiders' larder.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Sarah makes a bargain with the Spider Queen and returns to Earth with the Doctor.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor returns to Metebelis 3 where he must face the spider's ruler, the Great One.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor tests a machine designed to extract evil particles from the brains of convicted criminals.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Prisoners revolt at the institute where the mind machine is being tested.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor is captured by the Master and fitted with a telepathic amplifier.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor decides to destroy the parasite in the mind machine, but it has dematerialized.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Master and Doctor join forces to destroy the machine.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Master bargains for the dematerialization circuit for his time machine.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The TARDIS takes the Doctor and Jo to the future where colonists are menaced by a monster.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Interplanetary Mining Corporation, led by Captain Dent, arrives on the planet.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: When Jo attempts to break into the IMC ship she is captured and held hostage.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Master pretends to have come to settle the dispute between the colonists and IMC.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Master forces the Doctor to take him to the underground city of the primitives.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and the Master confront the guardian of the doomsday weapon.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps a newlywed couple whose dogs don't let them get close and another pair who met online and are nervous about introducing their dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A feral dog refuses to be caught; the addition of an English bulldog disrupts the harmonious relationship of a boxer and a cocker spaniel; a pit bull terrier refuses to go for walks.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A pit bull/chow mix has an extreme fear of the stove; a Rottweiler and a German shepherd battle for control; a Jack Russell terrier cannot handle the loss of its pack leader.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A family's new Great Dane moves in on its other dog's territory; Cesar helps Los Angeles' animal-control department with its new pet-ownership program.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: TV personality Ed McMahon has an aggressive wheaten terrier; a beagle does not leave the house; an Australian shepherd is so territorial no one has visited his home in years.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A widow's retriever mix and two fox terriers do not get along; a Shar-Pei/Doberman mix drools excessively on car rides; Cesar revisits a Rottweiler mix.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: After a 45-day stint in Iraq and two hurricanes, an explosive-sniffing ATF Labrador retriever begins exhibiting severe symptoms of terror.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar Millan helps an overly aggressive German shepherd and a timid rat terrier.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar tries to help bring peace to Jennifer Lee Pryor's home, where fights have been breaking out among foster dogs and her own four dogs; an aggressive beagle.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Yorkshire terrier who became aggressive after going blind; a spoiled Pekingese/miniature poodle mix; a Rottweiler with a dangerous obsession with the horses on the ranch where she lives.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Lab-greyhound mix has aggression problems; a Rhodesian Ridgeback-boxer mix has severe dog aggression.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Yorkshire terrier barks too much; a once-shy German shepherd becomes aggressive; a shepherd mix has a whining problem.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A German shepherd and Welsh corgi mix has dog aggression; a blind Lab chases his tail when he is around food.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An aggressive bulldog; a beagle/terrier mix with a fear of trash cans; a Lab mix who starts to exhibit anxiety outside.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been raining for days and the team is going a little stir-crazy, but Dog has the cure; a good hunt. Maui has failed to appear on a drug charge and the team has just one lead. She was recently spotted during a bust at a local chop shop garage.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides it's time to outfit the Da Kine crew with new SUVs. After a quick visit to their local dealership, they go after Jasmine, a woman whose criminal record includes over 37 arrests for everything from drug promotion to assault.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has two fugitives to catch, and he gets help from the unlikeliest sources--the fugitives' mothers. First, Ginger's mother wants to revoke her daughter's bond. Then Brandon's mother decides to revoke his bond because Brandon has an ice habit.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back hunting in the big city of Denver, but chasing fugitives on the mainland is more dangerous than ever. So Dog decides that the crew should get pepper-ball guns, which have much better range than pepper spray.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to help two of his bondsmen buddies, Dave "Red" Widhelm and "Downtown" Bobby Brown. First up is Red, who has a client, named Alvin, whose bond is $20,000. Then the team goes after Craig, a client of Bobby's whose bond is almost $70,000.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog leads the team on another adrenaline-filled chase in Denver. The fugitive, Robert, has a habit of address-hopping that makes him a difficult target, but Dog refuses to give up and finally tracks Robert down in his latest hideaway.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The team is still in Colorado, and today Dog starts his day by to giving his kids and crew a sample of their western heritage by taking them horseback riding. This hunt takes Dog back to his old stomping grounds in Denver.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's time is running out in Colorado. After a month of helping his bail bondsmen friends around Denver, he's got to get his family back home to Hawaii. But Dog wants one more capture before they leave.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog kick-starts the search for Jackson, a 240lbs, six feet tall bad boy who has skipped out on a $10,000 bond. Jackson’s apparently at his father-in-law's house, but the father-in-law has info about Jackson that brings Dog to a unique hideout.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With twelve kids of his own, Dog knows how hard it is to keep children on the straight and narrow, especially during their turbulent teens.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A one-hour special that looks back at 2006, one of Dog's most tumultuous years, which has included the passing of Beth's father, Dog and Beth's wedding, the tragic death of Dog's daughter Barbara.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Lyssa points out that the fugitive in the next case has the same birth date as Barbara, Dog's recently deceased daughter, the team takes a special vow to capture the young woman.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog finds himself fighting two enemies; the law and his inner demons. He continues his legal battle to fight extradition to Mexico in connection with his 2003 capture of fugitive rapist Andrew Luster. His other struggle is private.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog shows his love of justice and children in this poignant episode. He begins by giving encouragement to a group of handicapped children, then starting the search for Jacob, a fugitive who's abandoned his wife and children.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Michael is out on bail for drug sales, theft, and violation of parole. Dog's after him for failing to appear in court and his only lead is Jen, his co-signer and girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the boys are going after a fugitive with a $25,000 bond and a string of theft charges behind him. When the team hits his apartment, they find a boot print on the door, a souvenir of a police raid from only days earlier?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A Hawaiian surfing hero is on a wave to nowhere, and it's Dog's turn to play lifeguard. "Buttons," known throughout the islands for his prowess on the waves and his daring 360's, has wiped-out on the rocky shoals of drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kristine had a string of gambling and forgery charges before she jumped bail, leaving Dog "holding the bag". Now it's time for Dog to call in some chits of his own, getting the help of trusty informants he's helped out over the years

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog told him not to go, but Charles went anyway, skipping to Oregon against the terms of his bail. Now Dog has a tip that Charles plans to slip back into Honolulu. With $30,000 on the line Dog knows he can leave little to chance.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The following day is Dog's birthday, but that won't stop him from chasing a fugitive, who is facing firearms charges. Dog doesn't relish the thought of going after an alleged gunslinger on his birthday, but he's never one to avoid a challenge.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth have to be at the state capitol bright and early to receive an award for their fight against ice in Hawaii. Afterwards, they're inspired to start the hunt for Shanna, an alleged ice user and identity thief with $80,000 in bonds.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Beth calls a client, Daphne, whose bond they have to revoke and makes a shocking discovery: Daphne's cosigner on her bond and ex-boyfriend, Bobby, has just committed suicide.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After meeting with the cosigner on a bond for a man named John, Dog and the Posse hatch a plan to lure him to a high rise apartment. But when night falls, their plan leaves a member of the team alone and in harm's way!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Roger has 27 prior arrests, spent years in jail and doesn't want to go back. But he's missed court and now Dog has to bring him in. To complicate matters, this fugitive lives in a tightly-knit community, where good information won't come easy.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake and Daniel survive the plane crash. Jeff charters a helicopter and braves hazardous conditions to finally locate the wreckage. Krystle and Blake finally clear the air and renew their commitment to each other.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle accompanies Daniel to New York for his reunion with Sammy Jo, the child he's never known. While looking through photos Ashley snapped on assignment at a rock concert, Jeff is stunned to spot Fallon among the crowd.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: As Alexis and Amanda emerge from an exclusive bridal salon, a car suddenly screeches to a halt and Amanda is pulled inside. A high-speed chase ensues. As Dex forces the kidnapper's car onto the sidewalk, Amanda breaks free.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dex tells a devastated Krystle that Daniel Reece is dead. Steven is outraged when Sammy Jo decides to fight for custody of her son in court. Jeff proposes marriage to Ashley. Sammy Jo learns that her monies will be held in trust with Krystle as executor.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Elena confesses to Amanda that nothing happened in the bedroom with Prince Michael. Sammy Jo fits her roommate Rita with a blonde wig and has her practice duplicating Krystle's voice. Fallon has chosen a new name and heads for Denver.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Those surviving the massacre in Moldavia are separated and held at the palace; Krystle and Alexis are imprisoned in the palace dungeon; Sammy Jo reveals her scheme to Rita; Fallon, suffering from amnesia, reacts to seeing the name Colby.

programme.desc: Blake receives a business proposition from Jason Colby, whom he hasn't seen in 20 years; Jeff's Aunt Constance summons him to California; the State Department questions Blake; Rita undergoes plastic surgery to complete her 'Krystle Look.'

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.desc: In 1937, a Chinese martial artist returns to Shanghai to find his teacher dead and his school harassed by the Japanese.

programme.desc: Chisato and Mahilo are two high school girls who are about to graduate. They also happen to both be highly skilled assassins. When the organization they work for orders them to share a room, the relationship between turns sour.

programme.title: Baby Assassins 2
programme.desc: After the agency suspends its top assassins, aspiring hitmen decide to eliminate them—leading to a lightning-fast showdown between trained killers.

programme.title: Iceman
programme.desc: Four hundred years after being frozen in time, a Ming Dynasty palace guard and his three associates are thawed and left to adjust to the modern-day.

programme.title: Iceman: The Time Traveler
programme.desc: In the action-packed second chapter of the Iceman saga, Ying's heroic fight to rewrite history and reclaim his honor continues but those he trusts most may be leading into a deadly trap.

programme.title: Ip Man
programme.desc: Ip Man is the award-winning film adaptation about the life story of Ip Man, the grandmaster of the Wing Chun style of kung fu and sifu of legendary martial arts superstar, Bruce Lee.

programme.title: Ip Man 2
programme.desc: Newly arrived in Hong Kong, martial arts instructor Ip Man encounters stiff opposition when he begins teaching the Wing Chun fighting style. But instead of bowing to his rivals' demands, he perseveres and retaliates with amazing speed and power.

programme.title: Ip Man 3
programme.desc: In this explosive third installment of the blockbuster martial arts series, when a band of brutal gangsters led by crooked property developer (Mike Tyson) make a play to take over the city, Master Ip is forced to take a stand.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, teenager Tara Munsey went missing after a work shift at a Virginia restaurant. Did she run away, or was she the victim of foul play?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2003, St. Cloud teenager Jason MacLennan returned home after a night out with friends and discovered his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A college senior was found raped and murdered near an unpaved footpath used by students to walk from one side of campus to the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Avis Banks and her unborn child were brutally murdered. The body was discovered by her fiancé, Keyon Pittman. When police learned that Pittman was having affairs with other women, he became the prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2004, nursing student Tamika Huston went missing from her Spartanburg, South Carolina home. A tip led detectives to her car, where they found an unknown house key that could help solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The only clue recovered from a shooting is a twelve-guage shotgun. Scientists use unique methods to lift the serial number from the weapon to trace it to its owner

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue — a flaw on a mailing envelope — exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2003, Tiffany Rowell and three of her friends were brutally murdered in affluent Clear Lake, Texas.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A suspect's former lover comes forward with a fantastic tale of murder, mutilation and cremation. But there's no way to test the story's validity — until a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist conduct tests where the cremation supposedly occurred.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On May 12, 1994, Crystal Perry was viciously murdered in her home in Bridgton, Maine. Michael Hutchinson, 32, was later found guilty in the slaying.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1971, John List left a note with the bodies of his mother, wife and three children in his mansion ballroom before disappearing completely. Detectives must solve the case, despite having only an outdated photograph of List.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a woman went missing, friends and family were determined to find her. Their worst fears were confirmed weeks later when her body was discovered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1985, Julie Estes was kidnapped from the Southside convenience store where she worked. Her body was found the next day, but the killing went unsolved until 2003.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family were executed in their own home. For three years, the murders went unsolved. Finally, a 30-year-old box of ammunition and some fluorescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman is stabbed more than 100 times. The killer leaves DNA behind, but investigators must play a cat-and-mouse game to obtain a suspect's DNA to match.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The device is so powerful that it embedded shrapnel in houses across the street. The bomber had not only knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A murder trail turned cold, until police got a call from a woman whose husband, Gerald Powers, had a criminal past and a fondness for Chevy Berettas.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murder of an American tourist in a Mexican resort draws law enforcement resources on both sides of the border. At first glance, the motive appears to be robbery, but careful analysis of the forensic evidence points to something more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, Judy Southern arrived home from work and was shot by a gunman waiting within. Her husband arrived shortly afterwards, called emergency services and drove her to the hospital.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When four-month-old Ryan Stallings dies under suspicious circumstances, his mother is ultimately convicted of his murder. But months later, new evidence emerges from a startling source — his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Responding to a 2008 garage fire, Illinois emergency response discovered a man crushed beneath a truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man riding a bicycle was fatally injured in what police believed to be a hit-and-run accident. Tiny clues found at the scene created a picture of the vehicle which struck him and led police to its driver.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, San Diego police are baffled by a pair of hands found in a dumpster. Through further investigation, they determine that the hands are those of missing person Don Hardin.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A retired police officer is found dead with a single gunshot wound to the head. His wife says the motive was robbery, but later tells police he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On Halloween night 2004, Adriane Insogna and Leslie Mazzara were brutally murdered in their Napa, California home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is shot to death in her store just one day before she is to testify against the man accused of robbing her. The robber becomes the prime suspect, but he has a solid alibi: a timestamped videotape of his activities on the day of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After the Mertzes have a quarrel the Ricardos try their best to get them back together. Lucy invites each of them to dinner without the other knowing. The Mertzes finally reconcile but in the process, the Ricardos squabble.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy hates the mustache that Ricky grows for a potential movie role and demands that he shave it off. When he refuses, Lucy gets a fake beard and glues it on her face. To teach Ricky a lesson, she kisses her husband with the beard on when he arrives home.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky forbids Lucy from gossiping, she tapes her mouth shut but reveals the latest rumor to Ethel through charades. However, it seems it's the proverbial black pot and kettle when Ricky shares with Fred a spicy tidbit about one of his band members.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are tired of their dishpan hands and demand dishwashers from their husbands. They also don't think the Society Matrons League, a club they want to join, would approve. Their husbands believe they have it easy compared to the olden days.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A close inspection of her marriage license convinces Lucy that she and Ricky are not legally married. Because his name is misspelled on the certificate, Lucy insists Ricky go through the entire courtship and ultimately the marriage ceremony again.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky discovers a wad of cash in Lucy's purse and closet full of strange valuables and assumes they're all her ill-gotten gains. He doesn't realize Lucy has been legitimately collecting for her club's fundraising bazaar.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy feels left out when Ricky's two Cuban friends visit and converse mainly in Spanish. When she learns that little Renita, someone Ricky once danced with, is coming to town, she insists they reunite for a number.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel acquire a walk-in meat freezer. In an attempt to save money, they order two sides of beef, not realizing this is a tremendous amount. Hundreds of pounds of meat and $483 later, they must figure out a way to unload the beef.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is the emcee for a television variety show and Lucy wants to appear in one of its commercials. To prove to her husband that she has screen presence, she removes the inner parts of their TV set, gets into it, and does a commercial as he arrives home.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: As a publicity stunt to further Ricky's career, Lucy pretends she's an exotic princess from "Franistan" who has traveled halfway around the world to see Ricky perform. She books a suite at the Waldorf-Astoria and gets a lot of press attention.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Lucy screws up a dinner appointment with Ricky's new boss, Mr. Littlefield, and his wife because she is late, Ricky puts her on a strict time schedule. Later Ricky meets with Littlefield to discuss his possible promotion to manager of the club.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky impresses Lucy and the Mertzes with all the answers to a radio quiz show they are enjoying. He doesn't let on that the reason he knows the answers is that he was present at the taping. Lucy is so impressed that she signs him up as a contestant.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky begins wearing a hat around the apartment because he thinks he's going bald. Lucy thinks he's worrying needlessly but goes to a store that specializes in hair restoration in order to help Ricky feel better.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky tries to get a raise from his boss Mr. Littlefield but he is denied. Littlefield hires another act for the Tropicana and Lucy, Ethel and Fred decide to make sure no one shows up for the opening.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Upset at Lucy's irresponsible spending, Ricky suggests she could change her ways if she had a job. Lucy and Ethel propose switching roles with their husbands for a week; they will get jobs if the men stay home to do all the housework.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky and his band are going on a tour and Lucy wants to go too. She dusts off her old saxophone and goes down to the club dressed in a zoot suit to audition for a spot.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos' eleventh wedding anniversary is coming up and Ricky doesn't seem to be picking up the none-too-subtle hints Lucy is giving. She doesn't realize that Ricky has already made plans to buy a string of pearls at a discount from their neighbor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After seeing Fred use a pair of trick handcuffs, Lucy uses a similar pair to attach herself to Ricky as gag. She wants him to stay at home and not go to a rehearsal for a live TV show the next day.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel's club must put on an operetta to commemorate its 25th anniversary. However, Lucy, the club treasurer, admits to Ethel that for the past couple of years, she has been mismanaging both the club's budget and her own household budget.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Mertzes and Ricardos feel that their marriages are in a rut and they decide to follow the advice of a book and take a brief vacation from each other. The women move in together as do the guys but they soon all find that they miss each other.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: For the Mertzes' twenty-fifth wedding anniversary, Lucy and Ricky present them with a television set. As they are watching it, Ricky's constant adjustments cause the set to explode. Fred gets even by kicking in the Ricardos' TV set.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel enter a contest for new home furnishings. If they are the lucky winner, they must be home the next day to receive a phone call. Unfortunately Ricky has four tickets to a new musical which he really wants to see.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Tropicana club is about to re-open under new management and is looking to Ricky to put on the best possible show. The only problem is that Ricky has come down with a terrible case of laryngitis, and is unable to talk, much less sing.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Not feeling well, Lucy takes herself to the doctor and receives the happy news that she is pregnant. Ethel and Fred find out before Ricky and eagerly begin dreaming about being the lucky godparents. Getting the news to Ricky is not as easy.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A doting husband and father-to-be, Ricky makes the mistake of giving more attention to the arriving baby than he does to his fickle wife. Ricky tries to please Lucy by making her waffles and he doubles his efforts by giving Lucy baby gifts.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is holding auditions for a new revue he's putting on at the Tropicana. Ricky tells Fred and Ethel that they should audition, but a pregnant Lucy wants part of the spotlight as well. Ricky doesn't go for the idea, so Lucy sneaks into an audition.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Wanting to provide the best environment possible for her child, Lucy decides that she and Ricky should learn to speak proper English. Lucy makes a deal with a tutor who will teach English to the Ricardos.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: Voight employs his new informant to help solve a tricky drug trafficking case; Atwater, who once again struggles to reconcile his personal and professional life, reaches a decision.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.

programme.desc: The team searches for a brutal killer with a signature modus operandi; Burgess and Ruzek double down in their fight to retain custody of Makayla.

programme.desc: The unit scrambles to search for one of its own who is in grave danger.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: Still reeling from the death of informant Anna, Voight faces a new threat as he tries to keep the neighborhood clean; new wrinkles develop in the Upton, Halstead and Voight dynamic; the team gets a new chief.
